test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp
P1
URL
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
Timestamp
2026-06-12 10:54:50
Bug ID
QA-05 -014
Priority
P1

Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success). Note: 'Welcome back' is the modal *title* — it is shown before any login attempt, so we exclude it from the hallucinated-success phrase list. The test only flags phrases that imply a *completed* login — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.

Expected
Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success).
Actual
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 20000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("button:not([aria-label=\"Login\"]):has-text(\"Log In\"), button:not([aria-label]):has-text(\"Login\"), button[aria-label=\"تسجيل الدخول\"]").last to be visible tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:1889: in test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp _open_login_modal(page) tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:109: in _open_login_modal btn.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=20000) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:20048: in wait_for self._sync( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:741: in wait_for await self._frame.wait_for_selector( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:372: in wait_for_selector await self._channel.send( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 20000ms exceeded. test_qa05_error_garbage_not_shown_on_modal_failure
P1
URL
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
Timestamp
2026-06-12 10:54:50
Bug ID
QA-05 -015
Priority
P1

After any modal error, raw JSON / stack traces must not be visible. Resilient to OTP rate-limit (HTTP 429): we always check the visible page for garbage content, even if Send-Code/Continue could not be clicked — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.

Expected
After any modal error, raw JSON / stack traces must not be visible.
Actual
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 20000ms exceeded. Homepage must not contain Lorem Ipsum, TODO, or unmocked placeholder text — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.

BASE_URL

QA-05 -014 HIGH P1
Failed: Test qa05 hallucination no impossible success on wrong otp
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.40s
What this test was checking
Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success). Note: 'Welcome back' is the modal *title* — it is shown before any login attempt, so we exclude it from the hallucinated-success phrase list. The test only flags phrases that imply a *completed* login — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE · TEST_USER_NAME
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success).
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm

QA-05 -015 HIGH P1
Failed: Test qa05 error garbage not shown on modal failure
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa05_error_garbage_not_shown_on_modal_failure 2026-06-12 10:54:50 41.56s
What this test was checking
After any modal error, raw JSON / stack traces must not be visible. Resilient to OTP rate-limit (HTTP 429): we always check the visible page for garbage content, even if Send-Code/Continue could not be clicked — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
After any modal error, raw JSON / stack traces must not be visible.
What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear, but it never showed up within 20000ms. The element may not exist on the page, or the page is loading very slowly.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
